response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist engineer with strong TypeScript, AWS, and data-pipeline credentials and genuine recent exposure to MCP/agentic tooling (current role since April 2025). However, the role demands 8+ years of production-grade AI solution delivery, demonstrated RAG and vector-database expertise, and Python proficiency — none of which appear in the resume. The AI work is too nascent and too narrowly described to satisfy the depth required at staff level in a forward-deployed GenAI context.
strengths: Current role involves MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, directly relevant to the job's key technologies
Staff-level IC track record across multiple employers with evidence of technical leadership, mentoring (dojos, workshops), and conference talks
Hands-on AWS CDK, TypeScript, and high-throughput data pipeline experience from Pinepoint Systems and Dunnhumby demonstrates cloud and performance engineering competence
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume and skills list, yet it is a primary required language for this role
No mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLMs, or any ML/AI framework (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.) — the core technical surface of the position
GenAI experience is limited to roughly two months at the current employer with no quantified outcomes, falling far short of the required 8+ years of production AI delivery
